description.ko: 유리 프리즘을 통해 단일한 백색광이 생생한 유채색 스펙트럼으로 변하는 찰나의 순간을 포착하여, 명료함과 다각적인 관점이라는 상징성을 빛의 물리학으로 풀어냈습니다.
description.en: This visual explores the physics of light, capturing the precise moment a monolithic white beam transforms into a vivid spectrum of color through a glass prism, symbolizing clarity and multifaceted perspectives.

prompt: A close-up, hyper-realistic shot of a triangular glass prism positioned on a minimalist, dark matte surface. A single, sharp beam of pure white light enters the prism from the left, undergoing refraction and emerging as a brilliant, fanned-out rainbow spectrum. Soft caustic patterns and light dispersion details are visible on the surface. Cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, sharp focus on the glass texture and the vibrant chromatic dispersion.
